title: ToolContext extension wiring and signal_agent rename
purpose: Seven of seventeen registered tools fail because three ToolContext extensions are never installed: AgentToolInfra, SharedTaskStore, SharedToolCatalog. This brief wires all three extensions in builder.rs, making every registered tool functional. It also renames send_message to signal_agent to disambiguate from Meridian's collective messaging, and installs the AgentHandles extension for NA-006.
task: In norn-cli builder.rs, construct and install AgentToolInfra (AgentRegistry, Mailbox, Provider, EventStore, root agent UUID, ToolRegistry), SharedTaskStore (wrapping the store from NA-004 or InMemoryTaskStore as fallback), SharedToolCatalog (built from registry tool definitions), and AgentHandles (empty collection). Rename SendMessageTool to SignalAgentTool, rename the tool name from send_message to signal_agent, update guidance files, and update coord.rs.

requirements.title: Install AgentToolInfra on ToolContext
requirements.spec: builder.rs SHALL construct AgentToolInfra with all required fields and install it on the ToolRegistry's shared ToolContext.
acceptance: AgentToolInfra constructed with: AgentRegistry::shared(), Mailbox::new(), provider (from bundle), EventStore (from session), root agent UUID (generated or from session), ToolRegistry (Arc clone of the registry)
Installed via registry.shared_context().insert_extension(infra)
spawn_agent tool call no longer returns 'agent runtime not configured' error
fork tool call no longer returns 'agent runtime not configured' error
Test: build_runtime, invoke spawn_agent tool, verify it gets past infra_from(ctx)

requirements.title: Install SharedTaskStore on ToolContext
requirements.spec: builder.rs SHALL install SharedTaskStore on the ToolContext so the task tool is functional.
acceptance: SharedTaskStore wrapping the DiskTaskStore from RuntimeBundle (if NA-004 has landed) or InMemoryTaskStore as fallback
Installed via registry.shared_context().insert_extension(shared_task_store)
task tool call no longer returns 'task store not configured' error
Test: build_runtime, invoke task tool create action, verify success

requirements.title: Install SharedToolCatalog on ToolContext
requirements.spec: builder.rs SHALL build a SharedToolCatalog from the registry's tool definitions and install it on the ToolContext.
acceptance: Iterate registry.names(), build Vec<ToolCatalogEntry> with name and description
Wrap in SharedToolCatalog and install via insert_extension
tool_search tool call no longer returns 'tool catalog not configured' error
Test: build_runtime, invoke tool_search with empty query, verify alphabetical results returned

requirements.title: Install AgentHandles on ToolContext
requirements.spec: builder.rs SHALL install an empty AgentHandles collection on the ToolContext for NA-006 to populate at spawn time.
acceptance: AgentHandles type defined (re-exported from tools/agent/handle.rs or a temporary stub until NA-006 creates handle.rs)
Installed as empty collection via insert_extension
If handle.rs does not exist yet, use a minimal stub type that NA-006 will replace

requirements.title: Rename send_message to signal_agent
requirements.spec: The send_message tool SHALL be renamed to signal_agent to disambiguate from Meridian's collective messaging system.
acceptance: SendMessageTool renamed to SignalAgentTool in coord.rs
Tool::name() returns "signal_agent" instead of "send_message"
SendMessageArgs renamed to SignalAgentArgs
tools/agent/mod.rs re-exports SignalAgentTool instead of SendMessageTool
register_standard_tools in wiring.rs registers SignalAgentTool
send_message.description.md renamed to signal_agent.description.md
send_message.usage.md renamed to signal_agent.usage.md
Tool description updated: 'Send a signal to another running agent. Signals are ephemeral intra-session communication. With trigger_turn enabled, the recipient reacts at its next tool boundary.'
All tests updated with new name
Test: SignalAgentTool delivers to target mailbox (existing test adapted)

boundaries: SHALL NOT modify SpawnAgentTool execution logic — that is NA-006
SHALL NOT modify WaitAgentTool or CloseAgentTool logic — that is NA-007
SHALL NOT implement DiskTaskStore — that is NA-004
SHALL NOT implement profile loading — that is NA-001/NA-002
SHALL NOT rename MailboxMessage to AgentSignal — Mailbox is internal infrastructure, renaming internals is out of scope
SHALL NOT add todo!() or unimplemented!() macros anywhere
verification: spawn_agent invocation does not return extension-missing error — verified by test
task invocation does not return store-missing error — verified by test
tool_search invocation does not return catalog-missing error — verified by test
signal_agent delivers to mailbox — verified by test
No references to 'send_message' remain in tool names or guidance file names
